title: taraxacum plicatulum
intro: Taraxacum plicatulum, also known as the plicate dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum plicatulum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum plicatulum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
